results.title: Half of elderly women in Japan prefer AI over humans for personal advice
results.description: A recent survey in Japan found that almost half of elderly women living in the country prefer artificial intelligence over humans for advice on interpersonal conflict, a higher percentage than any other age demographic, where consulting a human remains the favoured choice.
